ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Toni Gentri, in court, in propria persona, decedent's former sister-in-law,

The court advises of the purpose of today's hearing and of its tentative ruling to close the estate on its own motion as described in the court's Order to Show Cause issued on Oct-06-2022.

The court takes the subject matters under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Nov-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Show Cause re closing the estate on the court's own motion will be set for Nov-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Status Hearing is continued to the same date.

All persons who were noticed on the petition for probate and the attorney who previously represented the deceased Personal Representative Mr. Payette, Byron Done, shall be notified of the Order to Show Cause.

Judge: Hon. William Barry. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
